attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT RANK() OVER(
 ORDER BY NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE, SOXRA.ADJUSTMENT_ID) + SRAKEY.MAX_VAL RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
 SOXRA.ADJUSTMENT_ID  SK_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT ,
 NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CD
 FROM 
 (
 SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SRA. RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY),0) MAX_VAL
  FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_ADJUSTMENT SRA ) SRAKEY,
 (
 SELECT GLOBAL_NAME,ADJUSTMENT_ID
 FROM  $$STGDB.ST_NGCCRM_RAE_ADJ_HDR_DTLS) SOXRA
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SOXRA.GLOBAL_NAME)
 WHERE NOT EXISTS (
 SELECT 1
 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_ADJUSTMENT SMATRX
    WHERE SMATRX.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
    AND SMATRX.SK_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT = SOXRA.ADJUSTMENT_ID)

SELECT
SRA.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY as RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
SCXCAH.ADJUSTMENT_CATEGORY as ADJUSTMENT_CATEGORY_CD,
SCXCAH.ADJUSTMENT_DESCRIPTION as ADJUSTMENT_DESCR,
COALESCE(SCXCAH.ASSOCIATION_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') as ASSOCIATION_TYPE,
COALESCE(SCXCAH.ADJUSTMENT_STATUS ,'UNKNOWN') as ADJUSTMENT_STATUS_CD,
SCXCAH.ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT as RPRTD_ADJUST_VALUE_FUNC_AMT,  
 COALESCE(SCXCAH.EXECUTION_EVENT,'UNKNOWN') as EXECUTION_EVENT_CD,
COALESCE(SCXCAH.ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE,'UNK') as ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_CD,
COALESCE(SCXCAH.GL_CATEGORY,'UNKNOWN') as JOURNAL_CATEGORY_CD,
SCXCAH.GL_SOURCE as JOURNAL_SOURCE_NAME,
CASE WHEN SCXCAH.START_DATE IS NULL AND SCXCAH.END_DATE IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END as VARIABLE_ROLE,
COALESCE(NGLA_DR.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY, -995 ) as DEBIT_GL_ACCOUNT_KEY, 
 COALESCE(NGLA_CR.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY, -995 ) as CREDIT_GL_ACCOUNT_KEY, 
 COALESCE(SCXCAH.CURRENCY_CODE,'UNK') as FROM_CURRENCY_CD,
COALESCE(NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,'UNK') as TO_CURRENCY_CD,
COALESCE(SCXCAH.EXCHANGE_DATE,SCXCAH.ADJUSTMENT_START_DATE) as CONVERSION_DT,
COALESCE(EOUGC_DR.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE,'UNK') as OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
SCXCAH.ADJUSTMENT_ID as SK_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT, 
 'CG' as SS_CD,   
 CASE WHEN NATL.RU_XAAS_PREPAYMENT_FLG IN ('N','Y') THEN -7777
ELSE
COALESCE(CASE WHEN COALESCE(NSOL_ORIG.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,NSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY) IS NOT NULL 
       THEN COALESCE(NSOL_ORIG.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,NSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY) 
       ELSE NSOL_CAL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END,-7777)
        END AS RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
             
COALESCE(NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,-7777) as RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY, 
 SCXCAH.ADJUSTMENT_PERCENT as RU_ADJUSTMENT_PCT,
SCXCAH.ADJUSTMENT_START_DATE as RU_ADJUSTMENT_START_DT,
SCXCAH.END_DATE as RU_ADJUSTMENT_END_DT,
COALESCE(SCXCAH.ADJUSTMENT_PCT_VALUE,0) * COALESCE(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1) as RU_ADJUSTMENT_USD_AMT, 
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) as EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER  as EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) as EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER  as EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CASE WHEN SCXCAH.ADJUSTMENT_CATEGORY='COGS' THEN 'DA' ELSE (CASE WHEN SCXCAH.SOURCE_DATA_KEY4 = 1 THEN 'DA'  
             WHEN SCXCAH.SOURCE_DATA_KEY4 = 4 THEN 'PA' ELSE 'NA' END)  END as ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
'I' as ACTION_CODE,
'I' as DML_TYPE
FROM 
 ( 
    SELECT
      ADJUSTMENT_ID                 
    , ADJUSTMENT_DESCRIPTION        
    , ORG_ID                        
    , APPLICATION_ID                
    , LEDGER_ID                     
    , ASSOCIATION_TYPE              
    , ADJUSTMENT_START_DATE         
    , START_DATE                    
    , END_DATE                      
    , GL_CATEGORY                                  
    , GL_SOURCE                                  
    , EXCHANGE_DATE                      
    , ADJUSTMENT_PERCENT            
    , ADJUSTMENT_PCT_VALUE          
    , ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT                  
    , ADJUSTMENT_CATEGORY           
    , CURRENCY_CODE                 
    , ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE                            
    , EXECUTION_EVENT                        
    , ADJUSTMENT_STATUS                         
    , SOURCE_DATA_KEY4                           
    , DEBIT_CCID                               
    , CREDIT_CCID                           
    , LINE_ID         
    , CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID                                  
    , GLOBAL_NAME                   
    , EDW_CREATE_DATETIME                              
    FROM $$STGDB.ST_NGCCRM_RAE_ADJ_HDR_DTLS
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
      ADJUSTMENT_ID                 
    , ADJUSTMENT_DESCRIPTION        
    , ORG_ID                        
    , APPLICATION_ID                
    , LEDGER_ID                     
    , ASSOCIATION_TYPE              
    , ADJUSTMENT_START_DATE         
    , START_DATE                    
    , END_DATE                      
    , GL_CATEGORY                   
    , GL_SOURCE                              
    , EXCHANGE_DATE                 
    , ADJUSTMENT_PERCENT            
    , ADJUSTMENT_PCT_VALUE          
    , ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT                   
    , ADJUSTMENT_CATEGORY           
    , CURRENCY_CODE                 
    , ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE             
    , EXECUTION_EVENT                        
    , ADJUSTMENT_STATUS                          
    , SOURCE_DATA_KEY4                            
    , DEBIT_CCID                                
    , CREDIT_CCID                           
    , LINE_ID         
    , CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID                                      
    , GLOBAL_NAME                   
    , EDW_CREATE_DATETIME                               
      FROM 
    $$EXCEPDB.EX_NGCCRM_RAE_ADJ_HDR_DTLS
) SCXCAH
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON SCXCAH.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RAE_ADJUSTMENT SRA
   ON SCXCAH.ADJUSTMENT_ID =SRA.SK_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT           
   AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SRA.SS_CD
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC_DR
   ON SCXCAH.ORG_ID =EOUGC_DR.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT     
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
   ON EOUGC_DR.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_ORIG
  ON NSOL_ORIG.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = SCXCAH.LINE_ID
  AND NSOL_ORIG.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN (
     SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ABS(SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT), SS_CODE, ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG 
     ORDER BY SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT ASC)=1) NSOLV
     ON  ABS(NSOLV.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT) = ABS(SCXCAH.LINE_ID)
     AND NSOLV.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
     AND NSOLV.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG = 'Y'

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_SO_GLOBAL_NAME EL_GNAME
  ON EL_GNAME.ORG_ID = SCXCAH.ORG_ID
  AND EL_GNAME.ACTIVE_IND = 'Y'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_CAL
  ON NSOL_CAL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = SCXCAH.LINE_ID
  AND NSOL_CAL.SS_CODE = EL_GNAME.ORIG_SS_CD  AND NSOL_CAL.COMPLETE_LINE_RESULT_CD <> 'CLOSED' 

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
   ON SCXCAH.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID =NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT    
   AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NATL.SS_CODE 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR
   ON  (CASE WHEN SCXCAH.ADJUSTMENT_CATEGORY LIKE 'BOOKING%'  THEN  COALESCE(SCXCAH.CURRENCY_CODE,'USD')  ELSE  SCXCAH.CURRENCY_CODE END ) = NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE
   AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = 'USD'
   AND CAST(COALESCE(SCXCAH.EXCHANGE_DATE,SCXCAH.ADJUSTMENT_START_DATE) AS DATE) = NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE   
   AND NCCDR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate'
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA_DR
   ON NGLA_DR.CODE_COMBINATION_ID =SCXCAH.DEBIT_CCID  
   AND NGLA_DR.GLOBAL_NAME=SCXCAH.GLOBAL_NAME 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA_CR
   ON NGLA_CR.CODE_COMBINATION_ID =SCXCAH.CREDIT_CCID
   AND NGLA_CR.GLOBAL_NAME=SCXCAH.GLOBAL_NAME

SELECT
SOXRA.BATCH_ID                      
,SOXRA.ACCOUNTING_RULE_TYPE          
,SOXRA.ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT             
,SOXRA.ADJUSTMENT_ATTRIBUTE1         
,SOXRA.ADJUSTMENT_ATTRIBUTE10        
,SOXRA.ADJUSTMENT_ATTRIBUTE11        
,SOXRA.ADJUSTMENT_ATTRIBUTE12        
,SOXRA.ADJUSTMENT_ATTRIBUTE13        
,SOXRA.ADJUSTMENT_ATTRIBUTE14        
,SOXRA.ADJUSTMENT_ATTRIBUTE15        
,SOXRA.ADJUSTMENT_ATTRIBUTE2         
,SOXRA.ADJUSTMENT_ATTRIBUTE3         
,SOXRA.ADJUSTMENT_ATTRIBUTE4         
,SOXRA.ADJUSTMENT_ATTRIBUTE5         
,SOXRA.ADJUSTMENT_ATTRIBUTE6         
,SOXRA.ADJUSTMENT_ATTRIBUTE7         
,SOXRA.ADJUSTMENT_ATTRIBUTE8         
,SOXRA.ADJUSTMENT_CATEGORY           
,SOXRA.ADJUSTMENT_DESCRIPTION        
,SOXRA.ADJUSTMENT_ID                 
,SOXRA.ADJUSTMENT_PCT_VALUE          
,SOXRA.ADJUSTMENT_PERCENT            
,SOXRA.ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE             
,SOXRA.ADJUSTMENT_START_DATE         
,SOXRA.ADJUSTMENT_STATUS             
,SOXRA.AMOUNT_SOURCE                 
,SOXRA.APPLICATION_ID                
,SOXRA.APPLY_MID_MONTH               
,SOXRA.ASSOCIATION_TYPE              
,SOXRA.AUTO_EXECUTE_FLAG             
,SOXRA.BILL_ENTITY                   
,SOXRA.CM_AMOUNT                     
,SOXRA.CONVERSION_TYPE               
,SOXRA.CREATED_BY                    
,SOXRA.CREATION_DATE                 
,SOXRA.CREDIT_CCID                   
,SOXRA.CREDIT_SEGMENT1               
,SOXRA.CREDIT_SEGMENT10              
,SOXRA.CREDIT_SEGMENT2               
,SOXRA.CREDIT_SEGMENT3               
,SOXRA.CREDIT_SEGMENT4               
,SOXRA.CREDIT_SEGMENT5               
,SOXRA.CREDIT_SEGMENT6               
,SOXRA.CREDIT_SEGMENT7               
,SOXRA.CREDIT_SEGMENT8               
,SOXRA.CREDIT_SEGMENT9               
,SOXRA.CURRENCY_CODE                 
,SOXRA.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID               
,SOXRA.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID          
,SOXRA.DEBIT_CCID                    
,SOXRA.DEBIT_SEGMENT1                
,SOXRA.DEBIT_SEGMENT10               
,SOXRA.DEBIT_SEGMENT2                
,SOXRA.DEBIT_SEGMENT3                
,SOXRA.DEBIT_SEGMENT4                
,SOXRA.DEBIT_SEGMENT5                
,SOXRA.DEBIT_SEGMENT6                
,SOXRA.DEBIT_SEGMENT7                
,SOXRA.DEBIT_SEGMENT8                
,SOXRA.DEBIT_SEGMENT9                
,SOXRA.DM_AMOUNT                     
,SOXRA.END_DATE                      
,SOXRA.EXCHANGE_DATE                 
,SOXRA.EXCHANGE_RATE                 
,SOXRA.EXECUTION_EVENT               
,SOXRA.GL_CATEGORY                   
,SOXRA.GL_SOURCE                     
,SOXRA.GLOBAL_NAME                   
,SOXRA.HEADER_CHR_ATTRIBUTE7         
,SOXRA.HEADER_CHR_ATTRIBUTE9         
,SOXRA.INTERFACE_GL_FLAG             
,SOXRA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,SOXRA.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN             
,SOXRA.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,SOXRA.LEDGER_ID                     
,SOXRA.LINE_COGS_AMOUNT              
,SOXRA.LINE_ID                       
,SOXRA.MERAKI_FLAG                   
,SOXRA.OA_FLAG                       
,SOXRA.ORDER_NUMBER                  
,SOXRA.ORG_ID                        
,SOXRA.ORIG_DEFERRAL_SOURCE          
,SOXRA.PERCENT_ADJ                   
,SOXRA.PROCESS_ID                    
,SOXRA.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID        
,SOXRA.PROGRAM_ID                    
,SOXRA.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE           
,SOXRA.RAO_CREATED_BY                
,SOXRA.RAO_CREATION_DATE             
,SOXRA.RAO_LAST_UPDATE_DATE          
,SOXRA.RAO_LAST_UPDATED_BY           
,SOXRA.RECOGNIZED_BOOKING_PCT        
,SOXRA.REQUEST_ID                    
,SOXRA.SHIP_ENTITY                   
,SOXRA.SOURCE_DATA_KEY1              
,SOXRA.SOURCE_DATA_KEY2              
,SOXRA.SOURCE_DATA_KEY3              
,SOXRA.SOURCE_DATA_KEY4              
,SOXRA.SOURCE_DATA_KEY5              
,SOXRA.STADNARD_COST                 
,SOXRA.START_DATE                    
,SOXRA.TRANS_AMT                     
,SOXRA.TRANS_TYPE                    
,SOXRA.TRANSFER_PRICE                
,SOXRA.TSV_FLAG                      
,SOXRA.UNIQUE_ID                     
,SOXRA.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME            
,SOXRA.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           
,SOXRA.ACTION_CODE                   
,'RI'AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_NGCCRM_RAE_ADJ_HDR_DTLS  SOXRA  
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
ON(NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME=SOXRA.GLOBAL_NAME)
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT 1
FROM $$WORKDB.W_RAE_ADJUSTMENT SRA
WHERE SOXRA.ADJUSTMENT_ID=SRA.SK_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT
AND SRA.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
